skills.name: Cloaking
skills.description: Temporarily hides from the enemy's vision. Companions will be hidden and movement speed will be reduced by 4 when mounted. Applies buff that decreases the damage received from the enemy, and removes when using basic attack or attack skills.
skills.effect_text:
Decreases damage received by CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Dagger Slash
skills.description: Quickly slash with your dagger from side to side to deal damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: + SkillSR
20% damage against targets under [Stun], [Blind] and [Bleeding]

skills.name: Oblique Fire
skills.description: Shoot at a target. Apply [Oblique Fire: Slug], which increases your movement speed and decreases the enemy's movement speed. 5 stacks maximum: increases your movement speed when 3 stacks or lower and decreases the enemy's movement speed when 4 stacks or more. The bullet bounces off the initial target to a nearby enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Oblique Fire: Slug]
- Duration: 10 seconds
- Your movement speed +3 when 3 stacks or lower
Enemy's movement speed -5% when 4 stacks or more

skills.name: Double Attack
skills.description: Temporarily increases your critical rate. Basic attacks have a chance of applying as multiple hits.
skills.effect_text:
Critical Rate: +20%
Damage increases by CaptionRatio % and two consecutive hits are applied
Multi-hit Chances: CaptionRatio2 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Free Step
skills.description: Make your movements quick and nimble, temporarily increasing evasion.

attributes.name: Cloaking: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases damage received decrease effect by 0.5% per attribute level in [Cloaking] status

* Additional 10% increases at maximum level

attributes.name: Dagger Slash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dagger Slash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Oblique Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Oblique Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Double Attack: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Double Attack]'s additional damage by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Free Step: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Free Step]'s evasion increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cloaking: Successful Ambush
attributes.description: * After killing an enemy, there is a 30% chance you will enter [Cloaking] for 2 seconds.

attributes.name: [Arts] Dagger Slash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Dagger Slash] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Oblique Fire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Oblique Fire] by 1.25% per attribute level
